case_title: MARCIA GUISTI VS. CRISOSTOMO IBARRA, ESQ. ET AL

docket_entries.description: CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE OF APR-29-2015 CONTINUED TO JUN-10-2015 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
MINI MINUTES FOR JAN-26-2016 10:30 AM FOR DEPT 610

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR JAN-26-2016 CONTINUED TO MAR-29-2016 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610 FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) AND OBTAIN ANSWER(S), OR ENTER DEFAULT(S); PAY OUTSTANDING SANCTIONS. *** NOTE: IF PLAINTIFF'S COUNSEL FAILS TO PAY OUTSTANDING SANCTIONS OR APPEAR AT THE NEXT ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING, THE COURT INTENDS TO NOTIFY THE STATE BAR OF OUTSTANDING SANCTIONS. *** NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

SANCTIONS ORDERED IN THE AMOUNT OF $400.00 AGAINST MARTIN CUTLER FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT THE ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING ON: JAN-26-2016, PAYABLE ON OR BEFORE FEB-11-2016. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
